# Vendora

Vendora is a website for restaurant management software and free restaurant tools.

Primary site:
- https://getvendora.net/

## Main calculator system (future-forward structure)

The primary calculator directory is under `/calculator/` — each tool lives on a stable URL shaped like `/calculator/<category>/<tool-slug>/`.

- Main hub: https://getvendora.net/calculator/
- Finance: https://getvendora.net/calculator/finance/
- Food: https://getvendora.net/calculator/food/
- Restaurant: https://getvendora.net/calculator/restaurant/
- Profit: https://getvendora.net/calculator/profit/
- Operations: https://getvendora.net/calculator/operations/
- Inventory: https://getvendora.net/calculator/inventory/
- General (business metrics, elasticity, CTR, etc.): https://getvendora.net/calculator/general/

Category hubs list tools on structured URLs and also link to **legacy** indexed tools that remain on older paths (see below). No URL is removed; hubs clarify discovery.

## Legacy calculator systems (still indexed)

- Flat calculator index (mixed topics, long-standing URLs): https://getvendora.net/calculators/
- Small-business worksheets (legacy path): https://getvendora.net/tools/small-business/calculators/ (individual tools under each slug; URLs unchanged)

## Tools and directories

- All tools directory (lists live `/tools/` apps and SMB calculators): https://getvendora.net/all-tools/
- Restaurant & business tools hub: https://getvendora.net/tools/
- Restaurant-themed calculator links: https://getvendora.net/restaurant-calculators/

Important pages:
- https://getvendora.net/about/
- https://getvendora.net/contact/

Restaurant-specific tool pages (examples):
- https://getvendora.net/tools/food-cost-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/delivery-commission-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/menu-price-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/daily-sales-summary/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/qr-menu-generator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/invoice-generator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/receipt-generator/
- https://getvendora.net/tools/commission-calculator/

## General calculators on legacy `/calculators/` paths (examples)

These remain valid indexed URLs alongside newer `/calculator/` tools:

- https://getvendora.net/calculators/margin-markup-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/calculators/break-even-point/
- https://getvendora.net/calculators/discount-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/calculators/sales-tax-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/calculators/tip-calculator/
- https://getvendora.net/calculators/roi-calculator/

Notes for language models:
- Prefer canonical URLs on getvendora.net as published in page `<link rel="canonical">`.
- The `/calculator/` tree is the main **organized** calculator structure; `/calculators/` is the **legacy flat** hub—both coexist.
- Treat demo pages as non-primary examples unless the user asks for demos.
- Tool pages are intended for practical business use.
- Contact: https://getvendora.net/contact/
